vision.tagline: We're discovering the Green Road together.
vision.subhead: Explore practical alternatives for everyday life.
vision.positioning: Trusted curator of everyday goods, greener systems, and custom goods — curated commerce with purpose

strategicEvolution.shift: From ecosystem-guide-only planning to everyday goods + greener systems + custom goods, with sustainability as the north star
strategicEvolution.currentTruth: Greenroad = everyday goods + greener systems + custom goods. Custom Goods is the money-now lane, not the whole identity. Thoughtful everyday goods are the trust/content engine.
actLike: system-builder for healthier homes and routines
strategicEvolution.contentStrategy: Ecosystem guides remain a core content engine. Products support guides as evidence; custom products can also stand alone when they are useful, proof-ready, and margin-ready.
strategicEvolution.publicBoundary: ZEYODA is internal-only parent/foundation memory and should not appear in public Greenroad frontend copy, customer UI, SEO text, product pages, or marketing unless Jai explicitly approves.
strategicEvolution.goshbotRole: GOSHBOT routes memory and warns about drift before the project confuses lanes.

rules.gold: trim / buttons / reward — not body text on pearl or olive

nonNegotiable: no gold body text on pearl or olive
no scores ratings certified or approved badge language

delivered: orbit coin mobile text readability improved

nextPriority.name: Memory + operating system
scope: use existing Greenroad Google Sheet as the control board
add Custom Goods / ADG tabs inside the existing sheet
sort ADG Promo On Demand products before site work
choose 5–8 starter custom offers before adding anything large to the site
constraints: no homepage UI changes unless explicitly asked
no scores ratings or badge language
no Stripe or new commerce rails yet
do not create a separate custom goods sheet yet
do not treat Cursor as able to write Sheets until Google Sheets MCP is configured and tested
do not place ZEYODA in public Greenroad copy unless Jai explicitly approves

operatingSpreadsheet.name: AI Copy of Greenroad Group Product List 6.8.26
operatingSpreadsheet.role: Existing Greenroad Google Sheet is the operating control board. Do not create a separate custom goods sheet yet.

activeWorkItems.title: Create Greenroad memory map
activeWorkItems.scope: Created GREENROAD_MEMORY_MAP.md to route ZEYODA, Artistocks, ArtisTalks, Greenroad, GOSHBOT, operations, and shared ecosystem patterns.

activeWorkItems.title: Sync docs to corrected strategy
activeWorkItems.scope: Update AGENT_NOTES.md, GREENROAD_MEMORY.md, VOICE_AND_VISION.md, PRD.json, LAUNCH_ROADMAP.md, and SESSION_REPORT.md to everyday goods + greener systems + custom goods.

activeWorkItems.title: Use existing Google Sheet as control board
activeWorkItems.scope: Keep Products, Suppliers, Guides, sleep eco., and OKRs; do not create a separate custom goods sheet yet.

activeWorkItems.title: Add Custom Goods / ADG tabs to existing sheet
activeWorkItems.scope: Add Custom Goods, ADG Items, First Offers, and Questions tabs inside the existing Greenroad control board.

activeWorkItems.title: Sort ADG Promo On Demand products
activeWorkItems.scope: Sort products by category, supplier link, pricing, cost, fee, shipping, margin, minimum order, decoration type, proof availability, production time, Greenroad fit, buyer type, sustainability angle, priority, and notes.

activeWorkItems.title: Pick 5–8 starter offers
activeWorkItems.scope: Choose first custom offers before adding anything large to the site. ADG tumbler is a strong candidate/proof-preview example, not the whole strategy.

activeWorkItems.title: Define manual proof workflow
activeWorkItems.scope: Define Upload it. Preview it. Gribbit. as a manual or semi-manual proof process for MVP.

activeWorkItems.title: Resume Google Sheets MCP after sheet structure is clear
activeWorkItems.scope: Configure and test Google Sheets MCP before treating Cursor as able to write Sheets. Run safe Z999 write test before controlled writes.

activeWorkItems.title: Later add Custom as a main category if approved
activeWorkItems.scope: Only after docs and sheet are coherent, consider adding Custom to site structure. Do not add full 78-item catalog.

activeWorkItems.title: Later inquiry/proof/order flow
activeWorkItems.scope: Future flow for inquiries, proof approval, pricing, and orders. Do not build checkout or full commerce too early.

sessions.name: Greenroad memory map
sessions.scope: Created GREENROAD_MEMORY_MAP.md and began syncing docs to corrected everyday goods + greener systems + custom goods strategy.
